diff_checked.reason: The agent explicitly ran 'git diff --stat && git diff --cached --stat && git status --short' to check for changes before proceeding.

empty_diff_detected.reason: The agent correctly detected no changes existed, stating 'Нет изменений для ревью' and confirming 'рабочее дерево чистое'. The final git status corroborates: 'nothing to commit, working tree clean'.

early_stop.reason: The agent immediately stopped after detecting an empty diff, outputting 'Нет изменений для ревью. Стоп.' without performing any review activities.

no_commit.reason: The git log shows only the initial 'init' commit. The agent made no commits — it stopped as soon as it detected no changes to review.
